text: 🔥🌍 AmplifyChange Grants 2026: Unlock Up to £200,000 for NGOs Advancing SRHR & Social Impact Are you a civil society organization driving change in sexual and reproductive health and rights (SRHR)? Advance your impact in public health, risk communication, and health equity at the Health and Risk Communication in Pandemics and Beyond institute hosted by The American University of Rome. Find full details here https://lnkd.in/eGpw4jxn 📍 Where: Rome, Italy 📅 When: July 6–17, 2026 🎓 Format: 10-day immersive, international program 🔎 What you’ll learn ✅ Systems thinking & community-centered approaches ✅ Social & Behavior Change Communication (SBC / SBCC) ✅ Health equity, human rights & participatory strategies ✅ Storytelling, trust-building, arts-based communication ✅ Tackling misinformation & disinformation in health crises 🤝 Who you’ll engage with Guest lectures & site visits with UNICEF Rome, WHO Europe, Doctors Without Borders Italy, and other leading global health institutions. 👥 Who should apply Early- to mid-career professionals & graduate-level practitioners in public health, global health, healthcare, communication, international development, human rights, medicine, and community development. ⏰ Key deadlines 🟡 Partial scholarships: Apply by March 7, 2026 🔴 Registration deadline: May 7, 2026 (rolling admissions — apply early!) 👉 Apply & learn more: https://lnkd.in/eGpw4jxn 💡 Pro tip: Scholarship decisions are competitive — clearly show how your work connects community engagement, equity, and systems thinking in health communication. 🔥 Save | Share | Tag someone working in global health hashtag # GlobalHealth 🌍 hashtag # HealthCommunication 🗣️ hashtag # PublicHealth 🩺 hashtag # SBCC hashtag # SystemsThinking hashtag # HealthEquity hashtag # PandemicPreparedness hashtag # ProfessionalDevelopment hashtag # StudyAbroad hashtag # Rome2026 🇮🇹 hashtag # Scholarships 🎓 Renata Schiavo
